title: on import from github don't need a separate load
description: on import from github, don't need a separate load button - load after selecting/changing the repo (or for a single remote, load when the dialog is presented)

log.outcome: The specification is well-structured and complete for a small UI enhancement. The mission is clear, file scope is accurate, and steps have concrete verifiable outcomes. The testing requirements appropriately demand real automated test updates with specific assertions.

log.action: Step 1 (Update Tests for Auto-Load Behavior) → in-progress

Auto-load behavior implemented for GitHub import modal
log.outcome: Single remote: issues auto-load immediately when modal opens. Multiple remotes: issues auto-load when user selects a remote. Load button changed to Refresh button for manual re-fetch. All 27 GitHubImportModal tests pass.
